name: bolna-mcp
description: Manage Bolna voice AI agents, calls, and phone numbers from Claude.
long_description: Local MCP server wrapping the Bolna Voice AI REST API. Lets Claude list and configure your voice AI agents, review call history and transcripts, check phone numbers and wallet balance, and place outbound calls on your behalf. Requires a Bolna API key from your Bolna dashboard.

api_key.title: Bolna API Key
api_key.description: Your Bolna API key, from the Bolna dashboard.

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List agents in the account (id, name, status, created_at). Paginated.

tools.name: get_agent
tools.description: Full config of one agent by ID.

tools.name: list_agent_executions
tools.description: Call history for one agent. Paginated, defaults to the last 7 days.

tools.name: get_execution
tools.description: Full details of one call: transcript, status, cost, telephony data.

tools.name: get_user_info
tools.description: Account profile, wallet balance, concurrency limits.

tools.name: create_agent
tools.description: Create a new agent. Returns its ID.

tools.name: update_agent
tools.description: Patch an existing agent's name, prompts, welcome message, webhook, or voice settings.

tools.name: start_outbound_call
tools.description: Place a real outbound call from an agent. Spends account balance.
